R0218.title: Spatial Computing Privacy Leakage
R0218.definition: Biometric and environmental data such as eye tracking, gestures, spatial positioning collected by XR devices are accessed without authorization, leaking user privacy.
R0218.description: Biometric and environmental data such as eye tracking, gestures, spatial positioning collected by XR devices are accessed without authorization, leaking user privacy.
R0218.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
